seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pleystowe and Point Lookout. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pleystowe vs Point Lookout: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pleystowe and Point Lookout.
heading: Pleystowe vs Point Lookout — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pleystowe, Queensland and Point Lookout, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pleystowe has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Point Lookout (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pleystowe or Point Lookout safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pleystowe has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Point Lookout scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pleystowe scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Point Lookout scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pleystowe or Point Lookout?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pleystowe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
